creator: dch@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 199410
poudriere build log

fails to build under FreeBSD 12.0-RC1 amd64 against base OpenSSL 1.1.1; full poudriere log attached.

Building from latest git checkout produces same error. 

gmake[2]: Entering directory '/tmp/usr/ports/security/hpenc/work/hpenc-2.0/src'
c++  -O2 -pipe -fstack-protector -fno-strict-aliasing  -std=c++11  -I/tmp/usr/ports/security/hpenc/work/hpenc-2.0/chacha-opt/app/include  -I/tmp/usr/ports/security/hpenc/work/hpenc-2.0/poly1305-opt/app/include  -I/usr/include  -Wall -std=c++11 -I../chacha-opt/app/include -I../poly1305-opt/app/include -g -O2 -c aead.cc -o aead.o
In file included from aead.cc:29:
In file included from ./aead.h:26:
/usr/include/c++/v1/memory:2281:19: error: invalid application of 'sizeof' to an incomplete type 'evp_cipher_ctx_st'
    static_assert(sizeof(_Tp) > 0,
                  ^~~~~~~~~~~
/usr/include/c++/v1/memory:2598:7: note: in instantiation of member function 'std::__1::default_delete<evp_cipher_ctx_st>::operator()' requested here
      __ptr_.second()(__tmp);
      ^
aead.cc:79:11: note: in instantiation of member function 'std::__1::unique_ptr<evp_cipher_ctx_st, std::__1::default_delete<evp_cipher_ctx_st> >::reset' requested here
                ctx_enc.reset(EVP_CIPHER_CTX_new());
                        ^
/usr/include/openssl/ossl_typ.h:90:16: note: forward declaration of 'evp_cipher_ctx_st'
typedef struct evp_cipher_ctx_st EVP_CIPHER_CTX;
